print("Current objects:")
for node in seg['nodes']:

    print(f"  id={node['id']}, color={node['color']}, pixels={node['pixels']}, boundary={node['boundary'][:4]}")

ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print("\n=== Key area ===")
for i in range(25, 60):
    if i < len(ascii_lines):
        line = ascii_lines[i][30:55]
        if any(c in line for c in 'WNRGS'):

print(f"\nTop bar: {ascii_lines[0][15:47]}")
</parameter>
</function>
